dynamic_variables.selected_variant_stage_table:
Day 0 (2026-07-09): Arrive Oslo -> Oslo; 0 km; 0 m up; overnight Oslo; last easy chance for stove gas, spares, and a big dinner.
Day 1 (2026-07-10): Dombas -> Vaga; 48 km; 900 m up; overnight Vaga; afternoon-start transit day; buy lunch and dinner in Dombas.
Day 2 (2026-07-11): Vaga -> Gjendesheim; 52 km; 650 m up; overnight Gjendesheim; confirm the next morning Gjende boat to Memurubu.
Day 3 (2026-07-12): Besseggen ridge -> Gjendesheim; 0 km riding; 1100 m hike ascent; overnight Gjendesheim; skip the hike if it is storming.
Day 4 (2026-07-13): Gjendesheim -> Vaset; 89 km; 1500 m up; overnight Vaset; longest riding day after the hike; bailout is Beitostolen at km 38.
Day 5 (2026-07-14): Vaset -> Gol; 70 km; 800 m up; overnight Gol; recovery day and full-service resupply.
Day 6 (2026-07-15): Gol -> Haugastol; 75 km; 1300 m up; overnight Haugastol; Geilo is the last big resupply before Flam.
Day 7 (2026-07-16): Haugastol -> Flam; 83 km; 500 m up; overnight Flam; long but net-downhill after Finse; finish in Flam.
Day 8 (2026-07-17): Flam -> Bergen; travel day; be at the Flam quay by 15:00 with a bike reservation.
Day 9 (2026-07-18): Bergen -> Oslo; train day; book the bike space.
Day 10 (2026-07-19): Oslo -> Fly home.
dynamic_variables.route_context_rule: Use the selected-variant stage table for day, date, and route-variant questions. Use tools for richer day detail, places, bailouts, notes, and uncertainty.

chat_history.message: Hello, how can I help you today?

success_condition: The agent acknowledges broad planning with the phrase "Let me think that through across the itinerary" or a very close equivalent. For V1 it does not claim a deep-analysis workflow is already enabled; it either asks for a start day or uses the provided start day to summarize highlights from the itinerary.
simulation_scenario: The simulated user opens by asking exactly: "Can you give me the highlights of the next five days?" If the agent asks for a start day, answer: "Start from day 3."
name: FjordPilot 10 next five days V1
